title: melicope octandra
intro: Melicope octandra, also known as the Eight-angled Melicope, is a plant species in the family Rutaceae that is native to Australia and New Guinea. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Melicope octandra include treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as skin conditions like eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Melicope octandra can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used in conjunction with other herbal remedies to enhance their effects.
